name: darsly
description: Darsly — Arabic-first EdTech marketplace connecting private teachers with students. Secure video delivery, payments ledger, multi-tenant SaaS.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=apps/api & npm run dev --workspace=apps/web & wait
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.setup: docker compose up -d && npm install && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
